raw_consumer_statement: My card was stolen a few months ago, which I reported to my Best Buy Citibank card. I also submitted a dispute of the fraudulent charges. Today, they added those charges back to my account and proceeded to take a minimum payment autopayment of {$920.00}, when it is only supposed to be {$200.00}. I did not receive any notice that these fraudulent charges were added back to my account, nor that my payment would be so high. I was notified by my bank of the transaction. They failed to remove these fraudulent charges, failed at providing notice that they were being added back to my account, and failed to inform me they would then be charging me almost {$1000.00} for a minimum payment. My new card has yet again been compromised as there are now additional fraudulent charges for some " XXXX payment ''. I want those removed. I want this payment returned immediately and will pay the required {$200.00} minimum payment. I will no longer enroll in autopay as they seem it is ok to take as much money as they want at any given time. IF this is not handled accordingly I will be filing a lawsuit as they failed to give notice of any of these actions. I have gone through my letters they provided and downloaded every single one, not one of them has information pertaining to these charges being added back to my account or that they were deemed my responsibility since my card was reported lost/stolen. I cant even dispute these again because the old card no longer shows on my account, and those were the reason the card was reported lost/stolen to begin with
